name: Save JSON
description: Saves the DataFrame into the specified location in JSON Format

fields.name: path
fields.title: Path
fields.description: Path where to save the JSON files

fields.name: saveMode
fields.title: Save Mode
fields.description: Whether to Append, Overwrite or Error if the path Exists

fields.name: enableDownloadLink
fields.title: Enable Download Link
fields.description: Generate download links for the saved JSON files

fields.name: saveAsOneFile
fields.title: Save as One File
fields.description: Save the output as a single JSON file using coalesce
